CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_array VALUES (1, [1, 2, NULL, 4, 5]), (2, [10, 20, 30]), (3, [NULL, NULL, NULL, 40]);
SELECT arraySlice(values, 1, 2) AS slice FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arraySlice(values, 2) AS slice FROM test_array WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arraySlice(values, -2) AS slice FROM test_array WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, -3, 2) AS slice FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 1, -1) AS slice FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 0, 2) AS slice FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 5) AS slice FROM test_array;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, -1, 1) AS last_element FROM test_array;
SELECT arraySlice(arraySlice(values, 1, 3), 2) AS nested_slice FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arraySlice(values, 1, 5) AS full_slice FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32);
SELECT a.id, arraySlice(a.values, 1, count(b.ref_id)) AS dynamic_slice FROM test_array a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.ref_id GROUP BY a.id;
SELECT arraySlice(values, 1, length(values)) AS whole_array FROM test_array;
